summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2. TeamMembers.tsx now renders an 'Add Team Member' button visible only to admins (via userIsAdmin guard) that opens AddUserModal. AdminDashboard.tsx imports AddUserModal and has addUserModalOpen state with a UserPlus button in the team members tab area. AuthContext.tsx adds a robust isAdmin check handling enum serialization. Both core requirements appear satisfied. However, the AdminDashboard.tsx diff is truncated, so the actual rendering of AddUserModal and the button inside the team members tab content cannot be fully confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The 'Add Team Member' option correctly invokes the AddUserModal in the Admin Dashboard team members tab
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboard.tsx diff is truncated after the stat cards section; the actual rendering of AddUserModal and the 'Add Team Member' button inside the team members tab content is not visible in the provided diff. Cannot confirm the button is rendered in the tab and the modal is wired up.

hallucinated_features.description: Extra role-string fallback check in TeamMembers.tsx using (currentUser?.role as string) === 'Admin' in addition to the isAdmin context value
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to fix the button visibility. Adding a secondary string-based role check beyond using the auth context was not requested. AuthContext.tsx already handles the enum serialization case internally.
